prescribed_exercises.notes: Start with this calming exercise to warm up. Focus on full finger extension.
Pinch coordination. Watch for compensatory shoulder elevation.
Grip strengthening. Avoid overextension. Rest 30s between sets.
Gentle wrist rotation only. Stop if patient reports pain.

notes: Patient has moderate spasticity in right hand. All exercises start at easy level. Increase difficulty only when patient achieves >75% score consistently over 3 sessions. Patient is motivated and responds well to visual feedback.
